title: Young man found dead in KwaNonqaba
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The body of a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The body of a 20-year-old man with multiple stab wounds was found lying in a small dumpsite behind a home in Lonwabo Street, KwaNonqaba, this morning, 8 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The body of a 20-year-old man with multiple stab wounds was found lying in a small dumpsite behind a home in Lonwabo Street, KwaNonqaba, this morning, 8 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said the police were alerted just after 07:30 and went out to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man, whose identity is known to Mossel Bay Advertiser, cannot yet be named until his next of kin have been informed of his death.","html":"The man, whose identity is known to Mossel Bay Advertiser, cannot yet be named until his next of kin have been informed of his death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said KwaNonqaba Detective Sergeant José Chuna is investigating a case of murder.","html":"Kapp said KwaNonqaba Detective Sergeant José Chuna is investigating a case of murder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No arrests have yet been made. Should anyone have any information on the incident, contact Chuna on 082 334 7566.","html":"No arrests have yet been made. Should anyone have any information on the incident, contact Chuna on 082 334 7566."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Young man found dead in KwaNonqaba
